items.title: Could Trump Target A Stake In UnitedHealth Next? Maybe ... Here's Why
items.description: The Trump administration's unique investment in Intel Corp. (NASDAQ:INTC) could be viewed as a template for how Washington may secure strategically vital industries by buying large stakes in publicly traded companies. INTC stock is moving higher. See the real-time chart here.
